invariant: Local deterministic smokes and Chrome viewport screenshots do not prove live Telegram WebView or production Worker KV behavior.

items.label: Real Telegram initData available
items.detail: No real Telegram WebView initData is present, so signed founder actions cannot be proven live.
missing: TELEGRAM_INIT_DATA or TG_INIT_DATA from a founder Telegram WebView session

items.label: Founder device WebView artifact captured
items.detail: No live Telegram WebView proof artifact exists; local Chrome screenshots remain layout-only evidence.
missing: capture redacted cambium.tg-device-proof.v1 from a founder Telegram WebView session

items.label: Production Worker internal token available
items.detail: QUESTS_PUSH_TOKEN is available without printing the secret.

items.label: Production Worker network probe captured
items.detail: The production Worker probe artifact is missing, stale, mismatched, or unsafe to trust. Network probing is disabled or lacks token in this run.
missing: rerun with --allow-network and a valid QUESTS_PUSH_TOKEN when capturing the probe

items.label: Mini app sends Telegram initData to signed actions
items.detail: The page reads Telegram WebApp initData before posting gate actions.

items.label: Worker validates Telegram initData
items.detail: The Worker route still validates Telegram initData before queueing gate actions.

items.label: Skill promotion operator consumer exists
items.detail: Skill promotions have an operator-owned queue consumer.

items.label: Side-quest operator consumer exists
items.detail: Side quests have an operator-owned queue consumer with current-envelope re-checks.

items.label: NPC local smoke remains deterministic-only
items.detail: A local NPC history smoke exists; live device provenance still depends on Telegram and Worker proof items.

items.label: Local mobile viewport proof available
items.detail: A fresh-enough viewport manifest exists and no newer failure receipt supersedes it.

capturePlan.invariant: Capture commands create redacted receipts; they are proof only after their artifacts validate ready.

prerequisites.detail: capture fresh TELEGRAM_INIT_DATA or TG_INIT_DATA from a founder Telegram WebView

privacy: raw initData comes only from env
WebView query and hash are omitted

privacy: Worker credential is used only as an authorization header
artifact stores status, response shape, counts, and body digest only

signedActionSmoke.detail: No redacted signed-action smoke receipt exists; queue/consume/refresh proof remains a live follow-up.
missing: capture redacted cambium.signed-action-smoke.v1 after Telegram signed action, Worker queue/list, operator consume, and mini app refresh
signedActionSmoke.invariant: Signed action smoke receipts prove mutating Telegram queue/consume/refresh paths and are tracked separately from the base live WebView/Worker readiness gate.
